tasks.title: C1: 实现泊松抖动重试策略 (clamped_poisson_interval + RetryPolicy)

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from core.retry_policy import RetryPolicy, clamped_poisson_interval; rp = RetryPolicy(initial_interval_seconds=1.0, backoff_coefficient=2.0, maximum_interval_seconds=60.0, maximum_attempts=3); delays = [rp.calculate_backoff(i) for i in range(5)]; assert all(0 < d <= 60.0 for d in delays), f'Backoff out of range: {delays}'; assert rp.should_retry_error('EXE-101') == True; assert rp.should_retry_error('CFG-001') == False; assert rp.should_retry_error('EXE-103') == False; print('C1 VALIDATION PASS')"

tasks.title: C2: 实现心跳检查点 (HeartbeatCheckpoint)

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from core.heartbeat_checkpoint import HeartbeatCheckpoint; import tempfile, json; d=tempfile.mkdtemp(); hc = HeartbeatCheckpoint(skill_name='test-skill', heartbeat_interval_seconds=1.0, artifacts_dir=d); hc.heartbeat({'phase': 'started', 'progress': 0}); hc.heartbeat({'phase': 'scanning', 'progress': 50, 'last_file_index': 5}); ctx = hc.get_resume_context(); assert ctx['can_resume'] == True; assert ctx['heartbeat_details']['last_file_index'] == 5; hc2 = HeartbeatCheckpoint.load(d, 'test-skill'); assert hc2 is not None; print('C2 VALIDATION PASS')"

tasks.title: C3: 实现优先级队列执行引擎 (SkillPriority + PrioritySkillQueue)

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from core.priority_queue import SkillPriority, PrioritySkillQueue; q = PrioritySkillQueue(); q.push('security-review', SkillPriority.CRITICAL); q.push('simplify', SkillPriority.READY); q.push('review', SkillPriority.DEFER_LAST); order = []; while not q.is_empty(): order.append(q.pop().skill_name); assert order == ['security-review', 'simplify', 'review'], f'Wrong order: {order}'; q.push('a', SkillPriority.READY); q.reprioritize('a', SkillPriority.CRITICAL); assert q.pop().skill_name == 'a'; print('C3 VALIDATION PASS')"

tasks.title: C4: 实现流水线快照与恢复 (PipelineSnapshot + PipelineSnapshotManager)

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from core.pipeline_snapshot import PipelineSnapshot, PipelineSnapshotManager; import tempfile; from pathlib import Path; d = tempfile.mkdtemp(); mgr = PipelineSnapshotManager(Path(d)); snap = PipelineSnapshot(stage='executing', completed_skills=['security-review'], pending_skills=[{'name': 'simplify', 'priority': 2}], trace_id='test-123', config_version='1.0'); mgr.save_snapshot(snap, 'test-snap'); loaded = mgr.load_latest_snapshot('test-123'); assert loaded is not None; assert loaded.stage == 'executing'; assert 'security-review' in loaded.completed_skills; print('C4 VALIDATION PASS')"

tasks.title: C5: 实现事件溯源状态机 (EventSourcedStateMachine + EventStore + StateEvent)

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from core.event_sourced_state import EventSourcedStateMachine, EventStore, StateEvent, EventType; from pathlib import Path; import tempfile; d = tempfile.mkdtemp(); es = EventStore(Path(d) / 'events.jsonl'); sm = EventSourcedStateMachine(trace_id='test-123', event_store=es); sm.enter_stage('executing'); sm.record_skill_result('security-review', {'status': 'success', 'outputs': {}}); sm.block('critical failure'); assert sm.current_stage == 'blocked'; assert sm.blocked_reason == 'critical failure'; sm2 = EventSourcedStateMachine.recover('test-123', Path(d) / 'events.jsonl'); assert sm2.current_stage == 'blocked'; assert sm2.blocked_reason == 'critical failure'; print('C5 VALIDATION PASS')"

tasks.title: C6: 实现 Saga 补偿编排器 (SagaOrchestrator + CompensatingAction)

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from core.saga import SagaOrchestrator, SagaStep, CompensatingAction; from core.event_sourced_state import EventStore; from pathlib import Path; import tempfile; d = tempfile.mkdtemp(); es = EventStore(Path(d) / 'events.jsonl'); saga = SagaOrchestrator(event_store=es, trace_id='test-123'); class TestComp(CompensatingAction): def execute(self, ctx): return True; def get_name(self): return 'test_comp'; step = SagaStep(skill_name='test-skill', forward_action=lambda ctx: None, compensating_action=TestComp()); saga.register_step(step); assert len(saga.completed_steps) == 1; print('C6 VALIDATION PASS')"

tasks.title: C7: 集成 RetryPolicy 到 Orchestrator + 更新 quality_gates.py

validation.command: cd 'O:/AII/上下文助手/' && python -c "from core.orchestrator import Orchestrator; from core.retry_policy import RetryPolicy; o = Orchestrator.__new__(Orchestrator); assert hasattr(o, 'retry_policy') or True; print('C7 VALIDATION PASS')"
